title: General Shadow Correspondence Sweep
claim: For unary false-theta/mock-shadow channels carried by A_m=Z/(2m)Z with even orientation vector a(-r)=a(r), the shadow map is the Phase Calculus projection-loss gate in the modular setting.
falsifier: A finite-module unary false-theta/mock-shadow pair with even orientation vector and known S/T/shadow data where the S/T carrier is not T_r=exp(pi*i*r^2/(2m)), S_rs=(2m)^(-1/2)exp(-pi*i*r*s/m), or where the known shadow is not the coefficient-stripped projection of the same retained carrier.
